'''Trad Mays''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] student at the [[University of Garos]] on [[Garos IV]]. He was clumsy but charming, and was attracted to [[Alexandra Winger]].<ref name="GH" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|A Glimmer of Hope|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
